change_summary: Wiki Page Quality Phase 1: Renderer enhancements with canonical frontmatter, grouped API docs, and configurable schema

render_page.description: Function signature unchanged. Output modified: adds frontmatter before title.
render_page.impact: Output-only change. Tests use 'contains' assertions, not position-sensitive.

render_hierarchical_index.old_signature: fn render_hierarchical_index(docs: &[WikiDoc], high_level_pages: &[(&str, &str)], concepts: &[(&str, &str, &[String])], project_name: &str) -> String
render_hierarchical_index.new_signature: fn render_hierarchical_index(docs: &[WikiDoc], high_level_pages: &[(&str, &str)], concepts: &[(&str, &str, &[String])], project_name: &str, schema: &WikiSchema) -> String
render_hierarchical_index.impact: All callers MUST pass schema. Default provided via render_index().

render_index.description: Added logic to create default schema. No signature change.
render_index.impact: Call sites unchanged. Behavior enhanced with schema support.

render_page_output_changes.entry_points: UNCHANGED: code block + doc + source ref

render_page_contains_title.reason: Title still present, just after frontmatter now

render_page_contains_entry_points.reason: Entry points section unchanged in content

render_page_contains_provenance.reason: Source references still present in entry points

render_index_table.assertion: Verifies table contains project name, module, coverage
render_index_table.reason: Index table logic unchanged, just grouped differently

renderer_uses_schema_groups.assertion: Verifies custom schema groups replace defaults
renderer_uses_schema_groups.reason: NEW TEST: validates schema parameter is used correctly

edge_cases_tested.missing_doc_strings: Handled: entry point renders without doc block
edge_cases_tested.unicode_in_titles: Not explicitly tested - RECOMMENDATION: add test
edge_cases_tested.very_large_file_counts: Not explicitly tested - RECOMMENDATION: add test

missing_tests.suggested_test: test_render_page_includes_frontmatter_section() — verify YAML block is present before title
test_lang_hint_unknown_extension() — verify fallback to raw extension
test_render_index_empty_docs() — verify header and TOC still render

weak_tests.reason: Uses weak assertions: md.contains("80%") || md.contains("80") — accepts both formats but doesn't verify exact structure
weak_tests.improvement: Add specific assertion for percentage format (e.g., exact '80.0%' or '80%')

regression_analysis.signature_compatibility: render_index() is the public API. All callers updated internally. No external breaking change.
regression_analysis.output_format_stability: Tests use 'contains' checks, not position/format sensitive. Adding frontmatter does not break existing assertions.
regression_analysis.schema_parameter: Mandatory parameter added to render_hierarchical_index, but only internal callers (2 total). Both updated.
regression_analysis.frontmatter_injection: Prepended before title. No rearrangement of existing sections. Section order preserved.
regression_analysis.integration_surface: Only integration point: caller passes WikiDoc. Output is String (markdown). No breaking changes to contract.

test_quality_assessment.naming_clarity: EXCELLENT — test names describe behavior: render_page_contains_title, renderer_uses_schema_groups
test_quality_assessment.assertion_significance: GOOD — assertions check for key content (sections, links, values). Some weak assertions (format-flexible).
test_quality_assessment.coverage_density: 69 tests for 6 modules (11 tests/module avg). High density on core paths (renderer: 8 tests, persistence: 11).
test_quality_assessment.determinism: EXCELLENT — all tests deterministic, no randomness, no time-dependent behavior
test_quality_assessment.independence: EXCELLENT — tests use sample_doc() and fresh schemas, no shared state between tests
test_quality_assessment.edge_case_coverage: GOOD — covers empty sections, missing docs, no matches. Missing: unicode, very large inputs.

recommendations.action: Add test_render_page_includes_frontmatter_section() to verify new frontmatter output
recommendations.reasoning: Core feature change: frontmatter injection. Without explicit test, regression possible if refactored.

recommendations.action: Strengthen render_index_table assertion: use exact format check, not || fallback
recommendations.reasoning: Weak assertion masks format changes. Precise assertion catches output regressions.

recommendations.action: Add benchmark test for render_hierarchical_index with 100+ modules to verify performance stable
recommendations.reasoning: Schema grouping adds O(n*m) filtering (n=modules, m=groups). Large repos may see regression.

recommendations.action: Document render_hierarchical_index schema parameter: expected groups, prefix matching rules
recommendations.reasoning: Signature change requires API documentation update for future maintainers.

conclusion: APPROVED FOR MERGE — All 69 tests pass. Renderer output changes are backward-compatible (tests use 'contains' assertions). Schema parameter addition is breaking but localized to internal callers (render_index, test). No bugs found. Regression risk LOW.
